            :body (:body full-pr "")}))
       prs))

{"code":";; Extract Linear issue ID from body using split on spaces
(defn extract-linear-id [body]
  (when body
    (let [words (split body " ")
          eng-words (filter (fn [w] (starts-with? w "ENG-")) words)]
      (first eng-words))))

;; Test on first PR body

{"code":";; Extract and clean Linear issue ID
(defn extract-linear-id [body]
  (when body
    (let [words (split body " ")
          eng-words (filter (fn [w] (starts-with? w "ENG-")) words)
          raw-id (first eng-words)]
      (when raw-id
        ;; Remove trailing punctuation like . , ) etc.
        (let [cleaned (replace raw-id #"[.,)\]]" "")]
          cleaned)))))
